sources.title: Modern Confucianism
sources.citation_zh: David Elstein，《现代儒学》，《斯坦福哲学百科全书》，2023。
sources.citation_en: David Elstein, ‘Modern Confucianism,’ Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, 2023.

sources.title: Chinese Philosophy, Modern
sources.citation_zh: 《现代中国哲学》，Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy。
sources.citation_en: ‘Chinese Philosophy, Modern,’ Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy.

sources.title: Feng Youlan (Fung Yu-lan)
sources.citation_en: ‘Feng Youlan (Fung Yu-lan),’ Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy.

claims.text_zh: 梁漱溟把中国文化理解为以内向调和的生活态度追求人与自然、理性与情感的均衡。
claims.text_en: Liang Shuming understood Chinese culture as pursuing harmony between humanity and nature, and reason and emotion, through an inward, moderate attitude toward life.
claims.explanation_zh: 这是《东西文化及其哲学》的文化类型论概括；它属于梁氏的宏观比较框架，不等于对所有中国历史经验的事实描述。
claims.explanation_en: This summarizes the cultural typology of Eastern and Western Cultures and Their Philosophies; it is Liang's comparative framework, not a factual description of every Chinese historical experience.
claims.excerpt_text: Chinese culture came directly to the second stage and thus was in fact morally precocious
claims.attribution_note: scholarly secondary summary of Liang's 1921 work

claims.text_zh: 冯友兰区分由理与体构成的真际和由气与用构成的实际，并认为前者在本体论上居先。
claims.text_en: Feng Youlan distinguished the True Realm of principle and substance from the Real Realm of material force and function, holding the former to be ontologically prior.
claims.explanation_zh: 这一区分构成新理学处理超越原则与现实世界关系的核心结构。
claims.explanation_en: This distinction is central to New Rationalist accounts of the relation between transcendent principle and the actual world.
claims.excerpt_text: the True Realm is ‘first,’ not temporally but ontologically
claims.attribution_note: scholarly secondary summary with reference to Xin lixue

claims.text_zh: 熊十力区分把握根本真实的智与认识日常事物的慧；前者是无能所分裂的内在证会。
claims.text_en: Xiong Shili distinguished wisdom that grasps fundamental reality from discernment of ordinary things; the former is an inward realization without subject-object division.
claims.explanation_zh: 该命题概括《新唯识论》以自证方式把握本心、并反对把根本真实客体化的立场。
claims.explanation_en: This summarizes the New Treatise's account of realizing the true mind directly and its rejection of objectifying fundamental reality.
claims.excerpt_text: Wisdom is non-dual, without separation of self and other
claims.attribution_note: scholarly secondary summary citing Xiong 1932 [2015], pp. 21–26

claims.text_zh: 牟宗三认为自由意志不能由理论知识证明，却能在现实的道德活动中被实践地体证。
claims.text_en: Mou Zongsan argued that free will cannot be proven by theoretical knowledge but can be practically realized and verified in moral activity.
claims.explanation_zh: 他借此改造康德问题：道德反应的现实性反过来确证自主意志，而非把自由仅保留为设准。
claims.explanation_en: He thereby reverses the Kantian problem: the reality of moral response confirms autonomous will rather than leaving freedom merely as a postulate.
claims.excerpt_text: it is realized and verified through moral activity in the world
claims.attribution_note: scholarly secondary reconstruction citing Mou's collected works

claims.text_zh: 唐君毅主张文化活动的价值首先在于直接显现人的精神价值，而不能还原为工具或功利价值。
claims.text_en: Tang Junyi held that cultural activity is valuable chiefly because it directly manifests the value of the human spirit, not because of instrumental utility.
claims.explanation_zh: 这一立场把人的道德心与内在尊严置于文化评价的基础，并据此批评功利主义与自然主义。
claims.explanation_en: This position grounds cultural evaluation in moral mind and intrinsic human dignity, and motivates Tang's critique of utilitarianism and naturalism.
claims.excerpt_text: it directly reveals the value of the human spirit itself
claims.attribution_note: secondary discussion quoting Tang Junyi's collected works, TJCW 9:328
